chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-577 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A.2882/2023 For hearing of main case 19.04.2023 Mr. Zafar Ali Laghari advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with IO/Inspector Wali Muhammad PS Sanghar and Zahid Hussain Kamboyo PS Sanghar. ----- Petitioner is father of one Babar Ali who is accused in FIR No.75/2023 u/s 9(I)E Narcotic Control Act of PS Sanghar. He has filed this petition seeking direction for constitution of JIT to be headed by some senior police official preferably Sirajuddin Lashari and not to cause any harassment to the family members of the petition. We have heard learned counsel as well as learned AAG who has filed comments showing that the petitioner has history of involvement in criminal cases of like nature and against him and his family members a number of cases have been registered. He further submits that in this case the challan has been submitted in the trial court and the trial court has taken cognizance of the offence against the accused. In the circumstances, we are of the view that the petitioner has a remedy before the trial court for filing an application for reinvestigation if he desires so. No case for interference under Article 199 of the Constitution for the purpose of reinvestigation after submission of the challan in the court is made out. Petition is accordingly dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
